title: Bread for the Yard
target: settle the wage-riot at the Crow's Wing yard before it costs the fort its winter contracts

contributions.line: I speak plainly, reminding the crew that the fort’s promises are thin, and their patience thinner.
Dren stands firm at the shoulder, his sword ready but silent, a silent reminder of the cost of violence.
Veska observes quietly, assessing who’s likely to listen and who’s just loudest in their anger.

outcomeNarrative: Imogen’s words, backed by Dren’s steady presence and Veska’s keen eyes, manage to cool the worst of the crowd, convincing most to stand down without further bloodshed.
